intro: Urostigma microcarpum, also known as the Jamaican Dogwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. The Jamaican Dogwood has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief, due to its potential sedative and anti-inflammatory properties.
